case_title: BLACK SEA STONE, INC. VS. CATHERINE CARHART et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTFF AND DEFENDANTS. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BLACK SEA STONE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CARHART, CATHERINE HOLLINGSWORTH, ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLACK SEA STONE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLACK SEA STONE, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARHART, CATHERINE HOLLINGSWORTH, ANN THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
